promotion_blockers: No Kotlin/Rust provider currently loads TurboVec indexes in product runtime.
Android native packaging has not been proven.
Embedding model storage, import/delete, memory, and latency are not validated on Android.
Analyzer Phase 9 remains blocked, so retrieval must not add duplicate active runtime layers.
safety_boundaries: Knowledge retrieval cannot create chromatogram numeric evidence.
Vector similarity cannot override graph geometry, calibration, trace, peak metrics, report gates, or compound identity.
used_entry_ids and Knowledge policy validation remain mandatory.
